candidate: L7 FEASIBILITY-FRONTIER -- consolidated cost/significance ledger over the lab graveyard (L1,L2,L3,L6). SYNTHESIS/meta track: NO new edge tested, NO new data. Reads existing FROZEN result JSONs and classifies each deployable leg against pre-declared gates.
purpose: Convert the program's qualitative meta-finding ('apparent edges die on the liquid universe after realistic cost') into a PRECISE two-gate classification, grounded entirely in already-measured numbers. Output a reusable a-priori go/no-go rule for future candidates.

gates_FROZEN.deployable_leg: the leg whose POSITIVE significance would constitute the claimed edge: for baskets = the long-edge leg at LIQUID scope (and ALL for contrast); for event-studies = the look-ahead-safe post window at LIQUID.
gates_FROZEN.SIGNIFICANCE_SIGN_gate: PASS iff gross (cost-free) deployable-leg has the RIGHT sign (positive for a long-edge) AND |nw_t| (or event-clustered |t|) >= 2.0. FAIL = SIGNIFICANCE-or-SIGN-WALL (no edge even at zero cost).
gates_FROZEN.COST_gate: PASS iff, having passed the significance gate, the NET-after-realistic-cost series stays positive AND |t| >= 2.0. FAIL = COST-WALL (real gross edge, eaten by realized cost).
gates_FROZEN.classification: NO-WALL (passes both -> deploy-candidate) / SIGNIFICANCE-or-SIGN-WALL / COST-WALL / BOTH (fails significance AND, hypothetically at zero-cost-significance, would also fail cost).

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Expect a TWO-GATE structure, not a single 'cost-wall'. Hypothesis: on the LIQUID universe the BINDING gate is SIGNIFICANCE/SIGN -- the gross edge itself is insignificant or wrong-signed BEFORE cost matters (apparent edges live in microcap). On the ALL/microcap universe the gross edge is larger but turnover-driven realized cost (~46-140bp) triggers the COST-WALL. Net: no candidate reaches NO-WALL.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: DESCRIPTIVE-SYNTHESIS. A forward go/no-go rule: a new candidate is worth a full disciplined test only if a cheap pre-check plausibly clears BOTH gates on LIQUID names (right-signed gross with enough independent observations for |t|>=2, AND turnover-implied breakeven below a realistic ~28-46bp). NO celebration; this is a decision tool, not an edge.
